title: The Voice Of Strangers
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: There are diverse voices calling for our attention. Voices of doubts, voices of disbelief, voices of fear. As believers, we have to learn to tune them all out and focus on what God has said. When God says 'Go', we have to learn to tune out the voice that questions it.

title: Brave
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The concept of Jireh in our realm entails that God is providential in seeing us through every assignment or task He sends us on.

title: Desires, Coincidences, Giftings
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The life of a believer is one that is led by the Spirit of God. But what place does desire, coincidences and giftings have in the decisions we make as sons of God?

title: Inner Witness
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The Believer is never without leading, whenever he or she is at crossroads, there is an 'inner witness' providing guidance on what to do, how to do it, and when to do it. Leading always seeks the believer.

title: Are You Listening?
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Many believers understand that God is more than willing to speak with them and lead them. But they also wonder how they can discern the voice of God. They ask questions like: - What does He sound like? - In what way does He communicate? - How can I be sure He is the one? - What if it's just my imagination speaking to me?

title: Whisper
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: In a world with many voices and opinions vying for our attention with the loudest bells, bangs and whistles, sometimes it seems hard to listen for the voice of God. God is always speaking to His children. The supernatural is not always found in the spectacular. Sometimes, He speaks in a whisper or nudge. His sheep know His voice and follow him.

title: True North
speaker: Pst. Laju Iren
description: God is more willing to lead us than we are willing to be led by Him. Irrespective of our past faults and failures, Jesus loves us and because of that, He will never hesitate to lead us!

title: Unashamed
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Like Paul, we are not ashamed of the gospel, because it is God’s power for salvation to everyone who believes. We will preach it boldly.

title: Drive
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: There is a saying that if every man sweeps his compound, the whole world will be clean. As believers, we know that if every man preaches the Gospel in his sphere of influence, the whole world will be saved. We are doing so much as a body but we can do much more if everyone makes a personal commitment to see the Gospel spread around his sphere of influence.

title: Olympia
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Just as in athletics, Believers must run the race for a golden prize, competing for the hearts of men.

title: Defense
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The believer must always be ready to defend and respond to anyone who asks for a reason regarding his belief in Christ. To evangelize effectively, he or she must learn the strategies that will help defend the Gospel properly because no soldier goes to battle without proper training.

title: Take Your Chains
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: We've been mandated by Christ to go make disciples of all nations. Hence, at the core of our existence as a church is the desire to see all men celebrating the endless life which Christ offers freely to all who believe.

title: How To Cast Out Devils
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Authority in Christ is not reserved for a special set of believers; it is reserved for as many as believe in Jesus. You are as powerful as the Bible says you are.

title: Lavish Victory
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The believer lives within the realms of Christ's victory. This lavish victory has granted us the ability to trample on the enemy.

title: How To Discern And Repel The Enemy
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The believer has the ability to discern when the enemy is at work and he/she also has the authority to repel every attack of the enemy.

title: Handling Spiritual Attacks
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The believer who has faith in the death and resurrection of Jesus Christ has so much to boast about. Nothing equips the believer to walk in his authority as much as the Word of God.

title: Toogether
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: You sit where Christ is seated! His confidence in power is your confidence! You are seated toogether!

title: Praise Along
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: A thankful heart is our disposition at all times.I will praise the Lord at all times; His praise will always be on my lips! Psalm 34:1

title: Overflow
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The Holy Ghost in the life of every believer is a promise of God upon salvation. We know we house God because His spirit lives inside of us.

title: Fasting Day 4 - Movement
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Seasons of Fasting and Prayer help us realign our desires with purpose. Pst. Emmanuel Iren talks about the spread of the gospel.

title: Fasting Day 3 - Diligence
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Seasons of Fasting and Prayer help us realign our desires with purpose. Pst. Emmanuel Iren talks about diligence in the life of a believer.

title: Fasting Day 2 - Consecration
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Seasons of Fasting and Prayer help us realign our desires with purpose. Pst. Emmanuel Iren talks about the consecration of a believer.

title: Abide
speaker: Pst. Laju Iren
description: Christ is the vine and we are the branches! And the only guarantee to being fruitful is to abide in Him!

title: Gaining Back Spiritual Form
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Spiritual growth demands intentionality and devotion to the word and prayer. As believers, we are forever fervent in spirit and never slothful in business.

title: Prophetic Purpose
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Prophecy serves as a vehicle for the communication of God's will. Everything God ever did, He first said He will do.

title: Generosity
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Money is a spiritual stethoscope that discerns the state of a man's heart. As a believer, your priority should be a plan to spend and be spent for the Gospel.

title: Limitless
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The life of a believer is a life in perpetual victory. Nothing is impossible for us in Christ. Nothing limits our ability by the Spirit of God. We speak this unto ourselves and walk daily in this knowledge.

title: Brilliant Fire
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The supernatural was never designed to replace the natural, therefore brilliant fire is to live in the balance of the natural and supernatural according to the scriptures!

title: Fortress
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The believer has a defence in God that will never fail even in tough times. That is why we consider God our 'fortress', and you should too.

title: Safety Meditations
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Just like a soldier goes to war relying on the training he has received to stay safe and alive on the battleground, you have to get up and use what you have.

title: The New Normal
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: As believers, we operate on a different level. The Supernatural is Our new normal!

title: Grace Is Lavish
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The Grace of God is spent lavishly on the believer without measure. It is the currency that bought his freedom.

title: Grace Is A Song
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Grace is a song, it's the believer's national anthem- one God sings over you because He reckons you blameless in His sight.

title: Grace Is By Faith
speaker: Pst Emmanuel Iren
description: Grace is a gift given to the world by God in the person of His Son, Jesus Christ. All you need to receive this gift, is to accept it by faith.

title: Grace Is Just
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: God carried out His mercy in justice. He didn't lose his integrity to spare the guilty, He found a worthy substitute in Christ for our sins.

title: Grace Is A Seal
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Our salvation is authentic, as is our eternal destination. God's grace has sealed us with his Holy Spirit, not our efforts. This is his mark of authenticity- His grace.

title: Grace Is A Gift
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: What qualifies us for the grace of God? Can we attain grace by our own efforts? Can we buy it with money? Is grace truly a FREE gift? If yes, how do we get this gift?

title: Grace Is A Revelation
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: It’s time to recalibrate! To learn of the very proactive benevolence of God freely demonstrated in Christ. We begin a new teaching series titled “GRACE IS”

title: Prayer Companion
speaker: Endless Life with Emmanuel Iren
description: Stir up your prayer life this period and beyond with prayer Companion!.

title: Healing School Finale - How To Recieve A Healing
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: One way to grow in the things of the spirit is listening to what you have been taught again and again.

title: Healing School V
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Irrespective of situations, the believer is admonished to continue in doctrine, for it is able to strengthen him and preserve him in tough times.

title: Healing School IV
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Do you think healing is for a select few excluding you? News Flash! God is willing and ever ready to heal you and he doesn't just heal, he empowers us to heal others.

title: Desiring Spiritual Gifts
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Spiritual Gifts are not for a select few; every believer can work effortlessly in them.

title: Healing School III
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: As limitless as the power of the spirit is, you can limit the manifestation in your life. Expectation is so important in our kingdom.

title: Healing School II
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: As good as encounters are, your conviction must still be on the word. When you are waiting, you will face pressures but you must hold on to the word.

title: Healing School
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Facts are not determined by experience. If you think God does not heal, it won't stop him from healing but it will affect the flow of healing in your life.

title: The Believer's Lovewalk IV
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The love of God is proactive. God always initiates, even if some people won’t accept

title: Building Happy Homes
speaker: Pst. Mrs Dele Bamgboye
description: Marriage is an act of obedience to God and an act of selfless service to a fellow man. It is a covenant act and the goal is to exemplify God to the world.

title: The Believer's Lovewalk III
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Sometimes the solution is not to keep arguing but to pray! Learn to forgive, learn to let go of those who hurt you because that is the Believer's Love Walk.

title: The Believer's Lovewalk II
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: There is an endurance and a consistency to love. Everybody responds to love and as children of God, we should show love to the undeserving.

title: The Love Code
speaker: Pst. Iren Emmanuel
description: Understanding that the most important person in the world loves you regardless, would change your perspective to life.

title: The Believer's Lovewalk
speaker: Pst. Iren Emmanuel
description: The sacrifice of Christ bestows on us the responsibility to love as nothing else does. The redemptive work of Christ has empowered us to love by the Holy Ghost.

title: Love Is Moving
speaker: Pst. Iren Emmanuel
description: We should see all men as those who Christ died for, Jesus did it, and we tell it. The gospel is nothing to be ashamed of, it's the good news.

title: Order Births Peace
speaker: Pst. Iren Emmanuel
description: Until you learn to do things when they are meant to be done, your peace would always be under attack. Disorderliness births lack of peace.

title: No title
speaker: Pst. Iren Emmanuel
description: Contentment is something to learn. It is not the natural propensity of man to be contented. One of the worst lies the devil can sell to you is the idea that your satisfaction is in your future.

title: Dealing With Anxiety
speaker: Endless Life with Emmanuel Iren
description: Our culture thrives on worry. There is always something to be worried about. Worry is a bad habit. It is a bad method of handling pressure.

title: Dealing With Insecurities
speaker: Pst Iren Emmanuel
description: How you handle situations, shows how much understanding you have of the Word of God. And in dealing with insecurities, this is not a psychological topic or one for those that are babes in the kingdom! And in dealing with it, the word of God is enough!

title: 2019 Cross-Over Service
speaker: Pst Iren Emmanuel
description: Prophecies always come with instructions. If it is something you need to do, there will be clear instructions. What is the formula to secure divine help? One factor is purpose. Nothing secures divine help like purpose!

title: Heritage
speaker: Pst. Iren Emmanuel
description: The culture we live in will make us feel like its way is the only way to happiness. We even give God the sense that we are sacrificing and missing a lot for him. God doesn't want us to only be saved, He wants us to be both happy and saved. It's an inheritance consciousness to know that you have received something great in Christ.

title: The New Normal - Finale
speaker: Pst. Iren Emmanuel
description: Final words before the impartation!

title: The New Normal - Joy as a Weapon
speaker: Pst. Iren Emmanuel
description: There has to be joy because of the faith. You move from duty to delight in your Christian devotion. Joy is a delight. We must savour the things of God. Passiveness is not of God. Joy is a spiritual principle

title: The New Normal - Prophecy
speaker: Pst. Iren Emmanuel
description: Spiritual Gifts have a fabric; a way they are meant to function. Paul told us to seek edification. A gift is as important as the needs that need to be met. He was emphasizing the importance of the gift of tongues and interpretations. Tongues and interpretations = Prophecy

title: The New Normal - Exercising Your Victory Over Sin
speaker: Pst. Iren Emmanuel
description: Your spirit should gain ascendency over your flesh but there are times when the flesh wins and your response should be I have an advocate with the Father! The scripture already gives us a clear picture of how temptations should be handled.

title: The New Normal - Vital Signs: When is my spirit normal?
speaker: Pst. Iren Emmanuel
description: Vital Signs: When is my spirit normal? The same way a doctor checks the temperature of a patient and know something wrong is the same way one can discern something is wrong spiritually!

title: The New Normal - Righteousness Consciousness
speaker: Pst. Iren Emmanuel
description: Righteousness Consciousness. What's more important than fasting and praying is knowing how to receive from God.

title: How To Pray - PART 2
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Our desires will always affect our prayer life, if our desires are not in order prayer will not be in order. When it comes to prayer we don't always know how to pray so the holy spirit helps us. The holy spirit helps us with realigning our priorities and in so doing helps with prayer. He realigns our desire not just to stop bad habits but to pick up good habits. The advent of the spirit has changed prayer forever praying in the Holy Ghost is a privilege of redemption. Acts 2:33 praying in the sp

title: How To Pray
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The notion that you learn to pray only by praying is not entirely true; there is a difference between the culture of prayer & effective prayer. Jesus taught His disciples lessons on how not to pray as much as He taught them how to pray. Matt 6:5-6, 31-33. Prayer is not about technicalities, language construction or eloquence, it is all about who you are in respect to your relationship with the Father. The No.1 rule in prayer is to know who you are; prayer is a matter of identity & a matter of th

title: How Long Must I Pray
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: The balance for the believer is that his prayer life must comprise of long and short prayers if his prayer must be effective; the effectiveness of his short prayers is dependent on the long prayers he has made in the secret. 1 Thes 5:17.

title: Why Pray
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: People ask; 'If there is a God, why do bad things happen to people?' Well, if there are Barbers, why do people have bushy hair?

description: Why is my marriage failing? The missing link is usually the how! If Christ is not your foundation, don't bother getting married.

speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Mark 11:24 KJVS Therefore I say unto you, What things soever ye desire, when ye pray, believe that ye receive them, and ye shall have them. You must have the unseen evidence first. Believe you have them first, before you receive.

title: Faith is Brilliant
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Faith is not just a belief in God, but the belief in God that produces a supernatural intelligence on what to do! Faith is BRILLIANT!

title: Faith is Tenacious
speaker: Pst. Emmanuel Iren
description: Faith in the Bible means different things in different context. It might refer to saving faith, it might refer to the doctrine of Faith, it can also refer to Charismatic Faith! As important as the context of faith is, so is the character of Faith. No matter the context, the character of Faith is TENACIOUS!
